mnemonics.title: Union of Languages
mnemonics.content: Think of the union of two languages as combining all the strings from both languages into one set.

mnemonics.title: Intersection of Languages
mnemonics.content: Think of the intersection of two languages as finding the common strings between the two languages.

mnemonics.title: Concatenation of Languages
mnemonics.content: Think of the concatenation of two languages as combining strings from one language with strings from another language.

mnemonics.title: Kleene Star of a Language
mnemonics.content: Think of the Kleene star of a language as creating a new language with all possible combinations of strings from the original language.

acronyms.usage: CF languages are a type of formal language that can be generated by a context-free grammar.
RE is a way to describe a set of strings using a pattern.
FA is a mathematical model that can be used to recognize patterns in strings.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine combining two sets of strings into one set.
Imagine finding the common strings between two sets of strings.
Imagine combining strings from one set with strings from another set.
Imagine creating a new set of strings with all possible combinations of strings from the original set.

analogies.analogy: Combining two sets of toys into one box.
Finding the common toys between two boxes of toys.
Combining blocks from one box with blocks from another box to build a new structure.
Creating a new box of blocks with all possible combinations of blocks from the original box.
